Title: Transcriptional regulatory network of high-value active ingredients in medicinal plants

Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Identification as first MeJA-induced TF in A. annua
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for increasing artemisinin content
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. First identified methyl jasmonate-induced transcription factor in A. annua; 2. Regulates artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for improving artemisinin accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ABA-responsive factor identified as positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis; 2. Upregulates AaADS and AaCYP71AV1 expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis through ABA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Yeast one-hybrid, EMSA, promoter binding assays
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for enhancing artemisinin production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ABA-responsive factor that activates AaALDH1 expression; 2. Directly binds to AaALDH1 promoter; 3. Enhances artemisinin accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates expression through direct promoter binding
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis via ABA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Increases artemisinin content and drought tolerance
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for improving artemisinin production and stress tolerance
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Overexpression markedly increases artemisinin content; 2. Enhances drought tolerance in transgenic plants
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: ABA receptor involved in ABA signaling
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin accumulation through ABA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential regulatory target for modulating artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ABA-responsive kinase; 2. Inhibits phosphorylation of AabZIP1
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Modulates artemisinin biosynthesis through regulating AabZIP1 activity

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for light-mediated artemisinin enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Interacts with AaCOP1; 2. Positively regulates artemisinin biosynthesis; 3. Controls activity of AaGSW1
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis through light signaling

Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Induced by dark conditions and JA
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for manipulation to enhance artemisinin production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. R2R3-MYB induced by dark conditions and JA; 2. Inhibits artemisinin biosynthesis; 3. Directly binds to AaORA promoter
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Negative regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for enhancing artemisinin production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Activates AaCYP71AV1 expression; 2. Involved in light signaling
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis through light signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Key mediator of light-JA crosstalk for artemisinin enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Glandular trichome-specific positive regulator; 2. Binds to W-box in AaDBR2 and AaGSW1 promoters; 3. Activated by AaHY5; 4. Interacts with AaJAZ9; 5. Mediates light- and JA-induced upregulation of artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: AaJAZ9 suppresses transcriptional activation of AaWRKY9
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Light signaling (via AaHY5), jasmonic acid signaling
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Binds to promoters and activates expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Key mediator integrating light and JA signals for artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for manipulating JA-ABA crosstalk to enhance artemisinin
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Dual JA- and ABA-responsive TF; 2. Interacts with positive regulator AaORA; 3. Directly increases expression of AaDBR2 and AaALDH1 by binding to promoters; 4. Overexpression increases artemisinin production
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Activated by AaGSW1 binding to its promoter
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Direct binding and activation of promoters
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Integrates JA and ABA signals to positively regulate artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Upstream regulator in JA-ABA crosstalk network
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Dual JA- and ABA-responsive protein; 2. Binds to promoter and activates expression of AaTCP15
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Binds to promoter and activates expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Upstream regulator in JA-ABA crosstalk network for artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Upregulates artemisinin biosynthesis and enhances stress tolerance
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Salicylic acid signaling, drought stress, Botrytis cinerea infection
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for enhancing artemisinin production and stress tolerance
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SA-responsive TF; 2. Upregulates artemisinin biosynthesis; 3. Enhances tolerance to drought and B. cinerea
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis through SA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential component of SA-mediated artemisinin enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SA-induced TF; 2. Forms complex with AaNPR1 and AaTGA3; 3. Binds to AaERF1 promoter to increase artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Functions in complex with other TGA factors
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Forms complex with AaNPR1 and AaTGA3
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Binds to promoter and activates expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis through SA signaling complex

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Activates AaERF1 in response to cold stress
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for cold-induced artemisinin enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Activates AaERF1 via promoter binding; 2. Responds to cold stress
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Cold stress-responsive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for manipulation to enhance artemisinin by suppressing ethylene response
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Key TF in Eth signaling pathway; 2. Negatively regulates artemisinin biosynthesis; 3. Represses expression of AaADS, AaCYP71AV1, AaDBR2, and AaORA
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Eth suppresses expression of artemisinin synthase genes
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Negative regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis through ethylene signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential positive regulator for artemisinin enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential positive regulator for artemisinin enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of artemisinin biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Downregulated by MeJA, GA, or SA treatment
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for enhancing salvianolic acid production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. R2R3-MYB TF that promotes salvianolic acid accumulation; 2. Interacts with SmTTG1 and SmbHLH51 to form complex; 3. Expression downregulated by MeJA, GA, or SA treatment
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Forms complex with SmTTG1 and SmbHLH51
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Hormone signaling (negative regulation by MeJA, GA, SA)
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of salvianolic acid accumulation

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positively regulates tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for JA-mediated enhancement of tanshinones and phenolic acids
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Mediates JA signaling to positively regulate tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses; 2. Interacts with SmJAZ8; 3. Binds to promoters of SmPAL1, SmTAT1, SmCPS1, and SmKSL1
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Binds to promoters and activates expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses through JA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for JA-mediated phenolic acid enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-responsive MYB TF; 2. Binds to promoter of CYP98A14 and activates its expression
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Binds to promoter and activates expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of phenolic acid biosynthesis through JA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for JA-mediated phenolic acid enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. MeJA-responsive MYB TF; 2. Binds to promoter of CYP98A14 and activates its expression
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Binds to promoter and activates expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of phenolic acid biosynthesis through JA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positively regulates tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for JA-mediated enhancement of tanshinones and phenolic acids
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Interacts with SmJAZ1 and SmJAZ2; 2. Positively regulates tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses in hairy roots
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Pivotal role in JA signaling pathway
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Tanshinone and phenolic acid biosynthetic genes
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses through JA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positively regulates tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for JA-mediated enhancement of tanshinones and phenolic acids
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Interacts with SmJAZ1 and SmJAZ2; 2. Positively regulates tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses in hairy roots
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Pivotal role in JA signaling pathway
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Tanshinone and phenolic acid biosynthetic genes
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses through JA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for enhancing Sal B production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Activates expression of SmTAT1, SmPAL1, and SmCYP98A14; 2. Leads to increase in Sal B content
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of Sal B biosynthesis through JA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for manipulation to enhance Sal B production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Downregulates Sal B biosynthesis in transgenic S. miltiorrhiza
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Negative regulator of Sal B biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Induced by MeJA, yeast extract, Ag+
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for JA-mediated tanshinone enhancement
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Induced by MeJA, yeast extract, and Ag+; 2. Positively regulates tanshinone biosynthesis; 3. Directly binds to promoters of SmDXR1, SmCPS1, SmKSL1, and SmCYP76AH3; 4. Interacts synergistically with SmJAZ3 to mediate JA signaling
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Controls tanshinone biosynthesis in S. miltiorrhiza
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Directly binds to promoters and activates expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of tanshinone biosynthesis through JA signaling

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for enhancing phenolic acid production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Overexpressing increases phenolic acid content; 2. Directly binds to SmRAS1 promoter
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of phenolic acid biosynthesis

Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positively regulates tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for enhancing tanshinone and phenolic acid production
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Positively regulates tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses; 2. Activates SmDXR promoter
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Positive regulator of tanshinone and phenolic acid biosyntheses

Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Induced by MeJA, SA, and nitric oxide
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Jasmonic acid, salicylic acid, nitric oxide signaling
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for multiple hormone-mediated tanshinone enhancement
